content.body:
Hi all. After releasing Vite 8, we’re now seeing users blocked to upgrade because Oxc doesn’t support ECMAScript decorators.

Our current status: https://github.com/oxc-project/oxc/issues/9170

My question is: given the current stale state, how should Oxc approach conformance? Should we mimic one of the TypeScript, SWC, or Babel implementations and their outputs, or do a fresh implementation following the unmerged test262 PR?

My concern is that if we get this wrong, it could further fragment the ecosystem around this proposal.
in theory, all of TS and babel and SWC match the stage 3 decorators spec, albeit with the right configuration flags. are there differences you've found between them?
